candidate_constant.name: alpha (Arithmos signal ratio)
candidate_constant.definition: Ratio of residual PC1 variance (after Megethos removal) to random null in 4D
candidate_constant.interpretation: The fraction of cross-domain mathematical variance that is arithmetic-group-theoretic, beyond what size/complexity explains

transfer_matrix_findings.no_single_constant: Transfer rho varies 0.40-0.89 across pairs. No single universal transfer efficiency.
transfer_matrix_findings.but: The Arithmos signal ratio (1.577) is stable across all measurement methods. It is the ratio, not the absolute transfer, that is constant.
